name: sceletium tortuosum (kanna)
mechanism: selective serotonin reuptake inhibition (ssri) and phosphodiesterase-4 (pde4) inhibition [9 | 4]
contraindications: avoid with do not combine with other serotonergic substances
safetyNotes: Moderate risk: side effects or medication interactions are plausible. Avoid use during pregnancy unless advised by a clinician; Do not combine with serotonergic drugs or MAOIs without medical guidance.
description: south african succulent chewed to elevate mood and decrease tension.
dosage: Extract products vary; follow labeled serving sizes and avoid combining with serotonergic drugs.
